top_signals.title: Nichirei to fully resume operations as early as next week
top_signals.summary: The company on Friday partially restarted operations at refrigerated warehouses and food factories, by accepting limited orders from client companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Saronic picks Texas port for $3B shipyard, betting on defense manufacturing boom
top_signals.summary:
Austin-based Saronic has selected the Port of Brownsville, Texas, for its flagship $3 billion autonomous shipyard project.

The post Saronic picks Texas port for $3B shipyard, betting on defense manufacturing boom appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Remarks by Commissioner Albuquerque at the press conference on the Report on the competitiveness of the EU banking sector
top_signals.summary:
